untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) consecutive periods without pullback >2% — requires multi-bar lookback logic not expressible as single condition; (2) fundamental news event detection — no fundamental/sentiment indicator available; (3) market ignoring news for 5+ days — requires event tracking external to price/volume; (4) price extension >3 standard deviations from MA — would need custom indicator combining standard deviation with price distance. Used price_pos_20 as proxy for extension detection, but this is a weak approximation of the hysterical blowoff condition.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price_pos_20 (normalized position in 20-period range) as proxy for extreme extension. Entry requires price near extremes (0-2% or 98-100% of range) with volume confirmation. Exit targets reversion to MA. However, the core signal requires multi-period continuation analysis and fundamental news detection which are unavailable. This translation captures only the mean reversion structure, not the hysterical blowoff pattern recognition that is central to the signal.
